title: Russian Urals Sts Activity Resurfacing In Med
section_path: Russian Urals Sts Activity Resurfacing In Med
section_path_text: Russian Urals Sts Activity Resurfacing In Med
summary:
Main
In this insight we highlight the emergence of Russian Urals crude oil loadings onto VLCCs via ship-to-ship transfers in Mediterranean waters. By Jay Maroo
For the first time in almost 6 months, Vortexa data shows Urals has been transferred onto a VLCC in Mediterranean waters. STS activity for Urals cargoes had largely dried up after the first half of last year as Chinese and Indian buyers imported Russian Baltic and Black Sea crude through direct shipments on Aframax and Suezmax tankers.
